title: Bacteria isolated in healthy dairy cows uterus or in animals with clinical and subclinical endometritis
author: Paiano, Renan Braga
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Project - Isolation of bacterial species in healthy dairy cows uterus and in animals with clinical and subclinical endometritis 

  Supplementary Material:  

  Table S1:  Frequency of bacterial species isolated among studied animal groups – N (%). 

  Table S2:  Distribution of bacterial isolation profiles for cows with SE (subclinical endometritis) and CE (clinical endometritis). 

  Table S3:  Distribution of bacterial isolation profiles among studied healthy cows.

keywords: clinical endometritis, subclinical endometritis, uterine microbiota, dairy cow, MALDI-TOF MS
